name: ServiceNow
description: Monitor ServiceNow users and incident tickets for ITSM compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Use a service account with REST API access in ServiceNow
2. Enter your instance name (the part before .service-now.com)
3. Enter the username and password for the service account

credentialFields.label: Instance Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your ServiceNow instance name (e.g., 'dev12345' from dev12345.service-now.com)

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: ServiceNow service account username with REST API access

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews ServiceNow users with active system access

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies ServiceNow has an active incident management process
